---
title: 'Strongholds'
date: '2014-11-14T23:20:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8023880057446732706'
blogger_filename: '/2014/11/strongholds.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir=ltr>Anytime you disagree with God you have agreed with a lie, and gave authority to The Liar. Holy Spirit, where did my fear of the platform start ? What lie did I believe? Bow has that affected me.</p>
